Multi-Quick Charging Protocol Identified, 25% Charging Speed Up, Provide PTC/Cyclic/Over-Charging/Over-Voltage/Over-Temperature/Over-Current/Short-Circuit/Over-Discharge Protection. You can rest assured to use it

5.【What You Will Get】: 135W Blue tip Laptop Charger × 1; AC Adapter Cable × 1. AntsWang charger Used In many countries like the USA, 1-year Warranty Serves, 30 Days Worry worry-free Back Policy, Exclusive Customer Service Team 7*24 Hours Back-Up for your Best Experience. To get the correct adapter, please double-check that your original adapter's output and interface size are identical. Package: 1 x ac adapter/ 1 x dc cable/ 1 x converter cable Portable compact design: You can work and charge your laptop anywhere. Carry the adapter with you in your bag. Charge your laptop anytime, anywhere. The chargers are not as bulky as traditional chargers, they are thinner and lighter. Automatic Protection: equipped with various safety mechanisms such as overheating protection and short circuit protection, ensuring the safety of users during use and effectively extending battery life.
